description: Red Tesla registered passenger cars with braked towing capacity above a threshold, grouped by model. Use for red Tesla towing questions.

configuration.query: FROM dmr-raw-000002 | WHERE KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Registreret" AND KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" AND KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejBetegnelseStruktur.KoeretoejMaerkeTypeNavn.keyword == "TESLA" AND KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejFarveStruktur.FarveTypeStruktur.FarveTypeNavn.keyword == "Rød" | EVAL braked_towing_kg = KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejOplysningTilkoblingsvaegtMedBremser | WHERE braked_towing_kg > ?min_towing_kg AND braked_towing_kg <= 5000 | STATS car_count = COUNT(*), avg_braked_towing_kg = AVG(braked_towing_kg), max_braked_towing_kg = MAX(braked_towing_kg) BY model = KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejBetegnelseStruktur.Model.KoeretoejModelTypeNavn.keyword | SORT car_count DESC, max_braked_towing_kg DESC | LIMIT 20

min_towing_kg.description: Minimum braked towing capacity in kg, e.g. 1500.
